yogurt-dip-argiro.name: Yogurt Dip
instructions: We use a small blender to mash all the materials.
Add the yogurt, olive oil, zest and lime juice to the blender.
Add the herbs of our choice.
Beat all materials for a few seconds until homogenized.
If you want a more fluid texture, add some water and mix.
Leave it in the refrigerator to freeze and always serve cool.
Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
